board.name: Zebrus Birthday Board
board.description: Shows who is celebrating their birthday today.
mail.text: Hello @,^I noticed you're a very thoughtful neighbor who remembers many birthdays! Here are the crafting blueprints for a Birthday Board so you'll never miss one again. %item craftingRecipe ZebrusBirthdayBoard %% [#]Mayor Lewis
mail.text_wall: P.S.:^I found another blueprint in my old records for you. A wall poster serves the same purpose and saves space! %item craftingRecipe ZebrusBirthdayWallBoard %% [#]Mayor Lewis
dialogue.thanks: You have already given {0} a gift today.
dialogue.no_birthday: Nobody in Stardew Valley has a birthday today.
config.radius.name: Chest Search Radius
config.radius.tooltip: Attention: This slider (1 to 50 tiles) is only applied if 'Specific Radius' is selected in the dropdown above!
config.filter.name: Filter Rare Items
config.filter.tooltip: Prevents extremely rare or irreplaceable items (e.g., Prismatic Shard, Pearl, or Magic Rock Candy) from appearing on the wishlist.
config.showitems.name: Show Loved Items
config.showitems.tooltip: If disabled, no items will be shown on the board or in the dialogue.
config.scope.name: Item Search Scope
config.scope.tooltip: Where should the mod look for items to count them?
config.filter_wine.name: Filter Wine
config.filter_truffleoil.name: Filter Truffle Oil
config.filter_truffle.name: Filter Truffle
config.filter_paleale.name: Filter Pale Ale
config.filter_starfruit.name: Filter Starfruit
config.filter_ancientfruit.name: Filter Ancient Fruit
config.filter_caviar.name: Filter Caviar
config.filter_iridiumbar.name: Filter Iridium Bar
config.filter_diamond.name: Filter Diamond
config.filter_fairyrose.name: Filter Fairy Rose
config.filter_item.tooltip: If enabled, this item will not be shown on the wishlist.
config.section_filter.name: Filter Specific Items
phone.name: Birthday Phone
phone.description: A mobile device that lets you check who has a birthday today from anywhere.
phone.mail: Hello @,^you've outdone yourself! No one in this valley cares for others as well as you do. In gratitude for your tireless efforts, I brought an old blueprint from the city. A mobile Birthday Phone! %item craftingRecipe BirthdayPhone %%[#]Mayor Lewis
config.gifts_board.name: Required Gifts (Board)
config.gifts_board.tooltip: How many birthday gifts must you give to receive the wooden board recipe via mail?
config.gifts_phone.name: Required Gifts (Phone)
config.gifts_phone.tooltip: How many birthday gifts must you give to receive the phone recipe via mail?
config.enable_phone.name: Enable Birthday Phone
config.enable_phone.tooltip: If enabled, you will receive the phone recipe after the set number of gifts. If disabled, the phone can neither be obtained nor used.
wallboard.name: Birthday Wall Poster
wallboard.description: A handy wall poster that shows who is celebrating their birthday today.
config.phone_inventory_only.name: Phone: Inventory only outside farm
config.phone_inventory_only.tooltip: If enabled, using the phone outside your farm (e.g. in town) will only search your player inventory, ignoring the set search scope.
config.show_hud_icon.name: HUD: Birthday Reminder
config.show_hud_icon.tooltip: If enabled, a small cake icon will appear next to the clock in the morning if it's someone's birthday and they haven't been gifted yet.
dialogue.anniversary:
Happy Anniversary!

Today marks {1} year(s) of marriage with {0}.
